---
name: Config / Setup Question
about: Not sure how to configure a run, set up a new component, or interpret an output
title: "[QUESTION] <short description>"
labels: question
assignees: Parameth

---

## What are you trying to do?

_Describe your goal — e.g. "Set up a new MRF zone for the rear wheel", "Add a refinement box around the front wing", "Run a floor aero study with a moving ground plane"._

## What have you tried?

_Paste your relevant `sim_config.ini` section(s) below:_

```ini
# e.g. [mrf-zones] or [refinement_zones]
```

## What's confusing or not working?

_Is the pipeline erroring, producing unexpected output, or do you just not know which parameter to change?_

## Script version

e.g. V1.2.0

## Run mode

- [ ] `operations`
- [ ] `debug`
